outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: White House optimistic about Iran deal as ceasefire extension reportedly agreed 'in principle'
outlets.summary: Cautious optimism on ceasefire extension while highlighting risks of blockade escalation and Iran missile recovery.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Lebanon and Israel hold rare talks in Washington as fighting continues in south Lebanon
outlets.summary: Focus on historic diplomatic moment juxtaposed with ongoing casualties — 16-20 killed in Lebanon on same day as talks.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran war 'very close to over' as US blockade chokes Tehran's economy
outlets.summary: Framing blockade as decisive pressure that's forcing Iran to the table. Hegseth impeachment dismissed as 'senseless.'

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: SecWar Pete Hegseth faces new and senseless Democratic impeachment effort
outlets.summary: Dismisses impeachment articles as political theater with zero chance of passing. Credits Trump for bringing Iran to its knees.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US Senate rejects another war powers resolution to limit Trump on Iran
outlets.summary: Emphasizes congressional dysfunction — 4th rejection of war powers. Focus on humanitarian toll in Lebanon.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Russia offers to fill China's energy gap as Lavrov meets Xi during Iran war crisis
outlets.summary: Geopolitical realignment — Russia-China energy axis forming in response to Hormuz blockade. Strategic implications for US.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Security cabinet discusses Lebanon ceasefire — no decision reached
outlets.summary: Netanyahu releasing strike video during cabinet meeting signals military wing prevailing over diplomatic track.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF says close to capturing Hezbollah's historic Bint Jbeil stronghold
outlets.summary: Military focus on Bint Jbeil operation. 100+ Hezbollah killed per IDF. 98th Division leading.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: No power can force Iranian nation into submission — President Pezeshkian
outlets.summary: Defiant tone — framing Iran as victim standing firm. Emphasizes constructive dialogue while rejecting surrender.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Pakistan Army Chief arrives in Tehran to deliver US message
outlets.summary: Covers Munir visit as Pakistan mediating between equals, not Iran capitulating. Araghchi's warm reception emphasized.
